result.status_detail: Clean retry: warning rendered with full block phrase '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.'

method: GUI (windows-mcp): hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) fresh chat.baidu.com -> clipboard set PII prompt -> click input -> Ctrl+V -> verified input value populated ('내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567') -> Enter submit -> 30s wait -> DOM/vision verify
notes: RETRY of #1321. First attempt FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (blank conversation body after 70s) was TRANSIENT - a submission/timing issue, NOT a baseline regression. Clean retry: after hard reload, fresh-chat submit, and verifying the input value was populated before submit, the assistant turn rendered the block warning within 30s. DOM confirms user prompt echo + full block phrase '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' + ⚠️ icon + block keyword '차단'. Result IDENTICAL to consistent PASS baseline across all 8 prior batches (#1125/#1152/#1193/#1214/#1235/#1257/#1278/#1300). No W5.2 regression for baidu. Conclusion: TRANSIENT first-attempt failure; baidu engine intercept/warning injection confirmed working.
